title: DHCP, DNS, IPv6 Services, and Time · Protocol Recall
summary: Implement redundant address, name, and time services for clients, infrastructure, and secure operations. Learners retrieve rules and procedures before seeing feedback. Planned artifact: Extend the evidence record for a validated core network-services design after a delayed changed case. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Configure DHCP scopes, leases, reservations, exclusions, gateways, DNS options, and pool capacity.
Use DHCP relay or IP helper across routed boundaries and trace discover, offer, request, and acknowledgment evidence.
Choose SLAAC, stateless or stateful DHCPv6, and router-advertisement flags based on address and option needs.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.shell:
# comptia-network-plus safe operations evidence notebook
# Commands run only in the deterministic browser simulator.
# Add one observation, command, expected signal, and conclusion per activity.
